productDisplayName: Puma Men Future Cat Remix SF Black Casual Shoes
description: A classic motorsport design mixed with a contemporary street look has brought forth these low profile puma Future cat Remix sneakers.UpperFeatures a low-profile design made for the avid motorsport enthusiastPremium leather upper for longer wearLow-profile cupsole and a functional stabilizer on both sides of the footBold, contrasting formstrip logo outliningAsymmetrical lacing system alleviating pressure pointsMidsoleCushioned footbed for enhanced comfortScuderia ferrari logo shieldOutsoleRubber outsole for enhanced tractionRubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorption
